_comment: Copy this to demos/demo.<slug>.json (slug = your issue/PR number, e.g. demos/demo.371.json) and tailor it to publish a demo. The 'replay' path is repo-relative with no res:// prefix. If your change can't be shown by a recorded battle (a paused-overlay interaction, an editor-only tool, a non-visual refactor), use demos/demo.skip.example.json instead. See demos/README.md.
caption: Describe what this PR changes and what to watch for in the clip.
